rows.label: Boss Galaga
rows.previousRisk: The prior sheet-cell primary crop visibly included neighboring/polluted pixels and was misleading in the Application Guide.
rows.trustedUse: Use cleaned motion-reference crops for formation-front and the two boss pulse/color phases.
rows.scoringUse: Primary target for boss-line runtime comparison; sheet dive cells remain provisional until recropped from gameplay/motion windows.
rows.playerMeaning: Boss identity needs to read as the capture-beam host and high-value threat before motion and damage states are tuned.
rows.nextGap: Promote clean boss dive, damage, tractor-beam host, and captured-fighter paired frames.

rows.label: Bee / Zako
rows.previousRisk: The prior sheet-cell crop was usable as a source-sheet hint but too small and ambiguous as a primary visible target.
rows.trustedUse: Use cleaned motion-reference crop for formation-front identity.
rows.scoringUse: Primary formation target for bee-line; flap and dive sheet cells remain provisional evidence.
rows.playerMeaning: Bee sprites set the baseline fleet texture and need to stay readable during formation rows and fast challenge-stage entries.
rows.nextGap: Extract target pulse pairs and dive silhouettes from clean temporal windows.

rows.label: Butterfly / Escort
rows.previousRisk: The prior sheet-cell crop was not reliable enough for a human-readable target row.
rows.trustedUse: Use cleaned motion-reference crop for formation-front identity.
rows.scoringUse: Primary formation target for but-line; flap and dive sheet cells remain provisional evidence.
rows.playerMeaning: Butterflies are the player’s main convoy-shape cue; their red/white/blue block silhouette must be recognizable at speed.
rows.nextGap: Extract target pulse pairs and dive/escort turns from gameplay/motion windows.

rows.label: Player Fighter
rows.previousRisk: Player ship proportions were corrected in runtime, but the earlier target crop lane still leaned on a tiny provisional source-sheet cell.
rows.trustedUse: Use the cleaned player-fighter crop from the segmented alien motion reference as the primary single-fighter target; keep turn poses provisional.
rows.scoringUse: Primary target for player-fighter runtime comparison and the derived dual-fighter composite; turn/capture poses remain provisional.
rows.playerMeaning: The fighter must feel smaller, crisp, and separate from reserve icons while preserving shot alignment and dual-fighter readability.
rows.nextGap: Promote clean turn, captured, carried, rescue, and dual-fighter spacing evidence from true target gameplay windows.

nextBestStep: Regenerate runtime-vs-target scoring against the trusted Boss, Bee, and Butterfly primary targets, then promote player-fighter and temporal pulse-pair targets.
